component.name: xDEX-UI
component.summary: A science fiction desktop running everywhere

description.p: xDEX-UI is a fullscreen, cross-platform terminal emulator and system monitor that looks and feels like a sci-fi computer interface. It is an updated and lightly maintained fork of the abandoned eDEX-UI Project.

Heavily inspired from the TRON Legacy movie effects, xDEX-UI strives to maintain a certain level of functionality and to be usable in real-life scenarios, with the larger goal of bringing science-fiction UXs to the mainstream.

ul.li: Fully featured terminal emulator with tabs, colors, mouse events, and support for curses and curses-like applications
Real-time system (CPU, RAM, swap, processes) and network (GeoIP, active connections, transfer rates) monitoring
Full support for touch-enabled displays, including an on-screen keyboard
Directory viewer that follows the CWD (current working directory) of the terminal
Advanced customization using themes, on-screen keyboard layouts, CSS injections
Optional sound effects for maximum hollywood hacking vibe

screenshot.caption: xDEX-UI with the custom horizon-full theme
